query: Find 10 parcels in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get municipality geometry by kommunenummer for Kristiansand

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge areas intersecting Kristiansand municipality geometry

3.description: get 200-year flood zones intersecting Kristiansand municipality geometry

7.description: keep only parcels intersecting both storm-surge and flood zones
